seoTitle: Clear Lake vs Clifton Creek — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Clear Lake and Clifton Creek. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Clear Lake vs Clifton Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Clear Lake and Clifton Creek.
heading: Clear Lake vs Clifton Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Clear Lake, Victoria and Clifton Creek, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Clifton Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (44/100) compared to Clear Lake (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Clear Lake or Clifton Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Clear Lake has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Clifton Creek scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Clear Lake scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Clifton Creek scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Clear Lake or Clifton Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Clifton Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.08% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
